questions.question: Why did Mahendra frequently move from place to place?

options.B: Because his job required him to supervise different construction sites
options.C: Because he was transferred by the government
options.D: Because he was searching for a house

questions.explanation: Mahendra’s job required him to work at different construction sites.

questions.question: Why was Iswaran able to narrate stories so dramatically?

options.B: He read many Tamil thriller books

questions.explanation: Tamil thriller books influenced Iswaran’s dramatic storytelling style.

questions.question: How did Iswaran describe the fallen tree on the road?

options.B: As a bushy beast lying across the road

questions.explanation: Iswaran exaggerated the fallen tree as a beast to create suspense.

questions.question: Why did the elephant enter the town in Iswaran’s story?

options.A: It escaped from a timber yard
options.D: It ran away from a circus

questions.explanation: The elephant escaped from a timber yard and ran into the town.

questions.question: What did the elephant destroy in the school ground?
questions.explanation: The elephant destroyed sports equipment in the school ground.

questions.question: What explanation did Iswaran give for stopping the elephant?

options.B: He struck the elephant’s toenail using a martial art technique

questions.explanation: Iswaran claimed he used a martial art technique to stop the elephant.

questions.question: Why did Iswaran prepare special food one night?

options.B: Because it was an auspicious day to honour ancestors

questions.explanation: Iswaran believed in preparing food to honour ancestral spirits.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra initially dismiss the ghost story?

options.B: He had never heard such stories

questions.explanation: Mahendra was rational and did not believe in ghosts.

questions.question: What psychological effect did the ghost story have on Mahendra?
questions.explanation: The ghost story influenced Mahendra’s imagination.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra avoid looking out of the window at night?

options.B: Because he feared seeing the ghost
options.D: Because Iswaran told him not to

questions.explanation: The ghost story had created fear in Mahendra’s mind.

questions.question: What did Mahendra first think the strange sound might be?
questions.explanation: Mahendra initially thought it was a cat.

questions.question: What literary technique does the author mainly use in the story?
questions.explanation: Suspense is used throughout the narrative.

questions.question: What explanation did Mahendra give for the mysterious sight?
questions.explanation: Mahendra believed it might be auto-suggestion.

questions.question: What made Mahendra finally leave the place?

options.B: Fear caused by the ghost incident

questions.explanation: The mysterious event frightened Mahendra.

questions.question: What theme does the story mainly explore?
questions.explanation: The story explores imagination and psychological fear.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra enjoy Iswaran’s stories?
questions.explanation: Iswaran narrated stories with suspense and excitement.

questions.question: What role does the setting play in the story?
questions.explanation: The lonely setting increases suspense.

questions.question: Which trait best describes Iswaran?
questions.explanation: Iswaran’s imagination makes him a fascinating storyteller.

questions.question: What contrast exists between Mahendra and Iswaran?

options.A: Mahendra is imaginative and Iswaran is practical
options.B: Mahendra is practical and Iswaran is imaginative

questions.explanation: Mahendra is rational while Iswaran is imaginative.

questions.question: Why does the story remain engaging?

options.A: Because of suspense and dramatic storytelling

questions.explanation: Suspense and storytelling keep readers interested.

questions.question: What human emotion is strongly portrayed in the story?
questions.explanation: Fear plays a major role in Mahendra’s reaction.

questions.question: What effect do Iswaran’s stories have on Mahendra?
questions.explanation: Iswaran’s stories influence Mahendra’s thoughts.

questions.question: What literary theme is central to the story?
questions.explanation: The story explores imagination versus reality.

questions.question: Why did Mahendra break into a cold sweat?
questions.explanation: Fear caused Mahendra to sweat.

questions.question: What message does the story convey?
questions.explanation: The story highlights the psychological power of imagination.
